prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类等专业持续高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数377900人，较2025年总考生285688人增加约9.2万人（+32%），物理类估算约22.9万人，竞争显著加剧；省控线数据2026年缺失，；北京理工大学位于北京，属一线城市，对西南省份考生有较强地域吸引力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 2665 → 1908 → 2577 → 1506 → 768, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend (ranking numbers decreasing, competition intensifying). In 2025, the baseline ranking for the Physics Category was about 768, a significant advance of about 738 places compared to 2024. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 72 in 2021, 102 in 2022, 100 in 2023, 100 in 2024, and 87 in 2025 for the Physics Category. The 2026 Physics Category plan is 64, a reduction of 23 students (-26.4%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction, theoretically lowering admission difficulty.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 14th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years (from 19th in 2021 to 14th in 2026), belonging to the top national science and engineering institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (such as the Gong Lin incident), but the school's public relations response has been relatively efficient. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with attention due to its status as one of the Seven Sons of National Defense. No significant record of admission cut-off gaps. Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors, strongly attracting engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and other majors continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 377,900, an increase of about 92,000 (+32%) compared to the total of 285,688 in 2025. The Physics Category is estimated to have about 229,000 candidates, significantly intensifying competition. Provincial control score data for 2026 is missing. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant advance in the 2025 ranking, the reduction of 23 places in the 2026 plan, the sharp increase in provincial candidates, and the somewhat negative school reputation: the enrollment reduction lowers admission difficulty, but the surge in candidate numbers and the high attention due to the school's top tier will drive up competition. After weighing these factors, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 science group is about 676, with a range of 596–756.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 596–756, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Information Science and Technology/Electronic Information Experimental Class as the main direction, with Tier 1 Xu Teli Elite Class/Top-Notch Program as a reach, and Tier 3 Intelligent Manufacturing/Industrial Design as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<596), you can focus on impacting the top-tier class types in Tier 1.
